title: dioscorea sambiranensis subsp. sambiranensis
intro: Dioscorea sambiranensis subsp. sambiranensis is a type of yam plant native to Madagascar, belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of diosgenin, a steroidal saponin with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea sambiranensis subsp. sambiranensis include its potential to alleviate menopausal symptoms, improve immune function, and protect against certain diseases. Dioscorea sambiranensis subsp. sambiranensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support women's health and well-being.
